calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Joseph K. Bravo, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Dawn Empson, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Golden Gate Funeral Escorts or Stan Kelly.
Default was entered against defendant Stan Kelly on January 6, 2010.
Default was entered against defendant Golden Gate Funeral Escorts on January 19, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice was to defendant Seno Edgar Brown, III was filed on March 10, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, November 4, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Dawn Empson, and against the Defaulted Defendants Golden Gate Funeral Escorts and Stan Kelly as follows:

Damages/Principal - $79,712.44.
Costs - Per Memorandum.

Total - $79,712.44.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
